picks.comment: Auto-captures Claude's actions during a session, compresses them, and re-injects relevant context into future sessions. Solves the 'every conversation starts from scratch' problem. +13k stars in seven days — the fastest-rising agent of the week.
A practitioner's notebook on patterns that actually move the needle when you're past the demo phase — agentic engineering, not vibe coding. Read it before installing your fifth code reviewer.

49 agents and 72 skills arranged like an actual game studio org chart. Niche, but the cleanest example I've seen of orchestrating many agents around one coherent workflow — worth studying even if you don't ship games.
